# Jump executes a transition to a target entity.

# Setup
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp

# Jump with no resources succeeds silently (nothing to plan or execute)
exec orbiter jump payments-api --yes

# With an unregistered resource the jump still succeeds — resource stays failed
# but the command exits cleanly.
exec orbiter resource add git-tool --role tool --brand git
exec orbiter attach git-tool payments-api
exec orbiter jump payments-api --yes

# Jump to unknown entity is an error
! exec orbiter jump nonexistent-planet --yes
stderr 'not found|no target'

# NOTE: the cd directive (stdout 'cd ') requires a filesystem resource with a
# configured directory path. That is exercised by the integration e2e tests in
# integrations/e2e_test.go once Phase 5 startup loading is in place.
